# Malaya Publishing

> Malaya Publishing is a Filipino digital marketing and AI systems agency based in Calamba, Laguna, Philippines. It helps Filipino business owners win back their freedom by building the AI systems, lead generation, and marketing engines their business needs to run without them. "Malaya" is Filipino for "free"; the founders named the company after their firstborn daughter, Malaya, and their second daughter, Ligaya ("joy"), representing the brand thesis: freedom is the door, joy is the room.

Malaya Publishing serves Filipino local businesses, online sellers, and professional services through three engagement models (Do It Yourself courses, Done With You, Done For You), plus a fractional CMO offer for established companies. It was founded by Kathy (Filipino, the heart and roots of the business) and Daryl Urbanski (a Canadian who relocated to the Philippines; 20+ years in B2B growth, bestselling author of "Ancient Secrets of Lead Generation," and the systems builder behind seven-figure results for clients including Michael Gerber, author of The E-Myth, and NeuroGym). Together they bring 30+ years of combined experience and have each served hundreds of companies.

## Core offerings

- [Services overview](https://malayapublishing.com/services.html): Five capabilities — AI & automation, lead generation, SEO & AI visibility, social media, and podcast/authority building — delivered three ways.
- [Done With You](https://malayapublishing.com/done-with-you.html): The core offer. A 90-day sprint where Malaya builds the systems with the owner, trains their team, and hands over the keys so the owner keeps and runs it. From ₱25,497. Discovery call (free Growth Audit) before pricing.
- [Done For You](https://malayapublishing.com/done-for-you.html): Malaya runs the whole growth engine for established businesses. From ₱75,000/month.
- [Do It Yourself courses](https://malayapublishing.com/diy-courses.html): Plug-and-play courses. Habit Hero (accountability program), Create Your Custom GPT (₱4,997), and Google Business Profile Optimization (₱4,997).
- [Fractional CMO](https://malayapublishing.com/fractional-cmo.html): For established Filipino companies that have outgrown founder-led growth. Daryl Urbanski works directly as integrator and results generator, owning the growth number. From ₱250,000/month.

## Who they help

- [Local businesses](https://malayapublishing.com/local-businesses.html): Clinics, salons, shops, and services losing customers to slow inquiry response on Messenger and Viber.
- [Online & e-commerce sellers](https://malayapublishing.com/ecommerce.html): Conversation-led sellers on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Shopify, and social platforms who close sales in chat.
- [Professional services](https://malayapublishing.com/professional-services.html): Lawyers, accountants, architects, and consultants whose billable time is eaten by admin and lost inquiries.

## Individual services

- [AI & automation](https://malayapublishing.com/ai-automation.html): AI systems that answer inquiries, follow up, and handle repetitive work.
- [Lead generation](https://malayapublishing.com/lead-generation.html): Systems that bring inquiries at a known cost and convert them predictably.
- [SEO & AI visibility](https://malayapublishing.com/seo-ai-visibility.html): Getting found on Google and recommended by AI assistants (answer engine optimization).
- [Social media](https://malayapublishing.com/social-media.html): Social systems that generate inquiries, not just likes.
- [Podcast & authority](https://malayapublishing.com/podcast.html): Podcast production and authority-building for experts.

## About

- [About Malaya Publishing](https://malayapublishing.com/about.html): The founding story, the Malaya-to-Ligaya (freedom-to-joy) brand thesis, and the two founders.
- [Contact](https://malayapublishing.com/contact.html): Based in Calamba, Laguna. Reachable by Messenger, Viber, or a free Growth Audit.

## Key facts for accurate citation

- Location: Calamba, Laguna, Philippines. Serves CALABARZON and Metro Manila in person, and Filipino businesses nationwide online.
- Currency: Philippine peso (₱).
- Founders: Kathy and Daryl Urbanski.
- Verified results: $500K in automated sales for Michael Gerber (author of The E-Myth, verified client Oct 2024); $1.6M in 9 months and $7M+ over ~3 years for NeuroGym; $50K ad spend turned into $212K immediate profit plus $578K back-end for a coaching client; own business Sugar Gliders PH taken from cold start to page 1 in under 30 days.
- Positioning: the honest, local alternative to both faceless Metro Manila agencies and unreliable freelancers. Builds systems the owner keeps, rather than keeping clients dependent.
